identity.name: RHYTHMIQ
identity.description: Next-generation music streaming and discovery platform
identity.tone: Immersive, energetic, deep, personal, 'night vibe', sleek, fluid

fonts.name: Manrope
fonts.usage: Body Text, UI Elements, Metadata, Numbers

grid_system.bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]
grid_system.sidebar: w-64 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-white/5 bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-xl z-40 hidden md:block
grid_system.player_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full h-24 border-t border-white/10 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-2xl z-50 flex items-center px-6 justify-between

containers.main_content: md:pl-64 pb-32 min-h-screen bg-background relative overflow-x-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,77,0,0.4)] rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-black font-bold hover:opacity-90 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.4)] rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-white/10 text-white transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full px-6 py-2
buttons.outline: border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white transition-colors duration-200 rounded-full px-6 py-2

cards.glass: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden
cards.neon_border: relative group rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-transparent hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300 bg-card
cards.minimal: bg-transparent hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors duration-200 rounded-lg p-4

inputs.search: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 w-full transition-all duration-300

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: fixed inset-0 z-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-primary/0 group-hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-500 rounded-xl

image_urls.description: Atmospheric concert crowd with moody lighting
DJ performing in club with neon lights
Soft morning light, abstract music vibe
City lights, bokeh, night drive aesthetic

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for all UI icons. Use larger sizes (20px, 24px) for better visibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Update `tailwind.config.js` to extend the theme with the colors provided in `design_guidelines.json`. Convert Hex to HSL for CSS variables in `index.css`.
2. FONT SETUP: Import the fonts (Syne, Clash Display, Manrope) in `index.css` using @import or link tags in `index.html`.
3. LAYOUT: Implement the Sidebar and Player Bar first. These are persistent. Ensure the main content area has the correct padding to avoid overlap (`pb-32 md:pl-64`).
4. GLASSMORPHISM: Apply the `glass-surface` gradient and backdrop-blur to the Player Bar and Sidebar. Do NOT make them solid black.
5. BENTO GRID: Use the 'Bento' grid system for the Browse/Discover page. Create variety by spanning some cards 2 columns wide.
6. ANIMATIONS: Use `framer-motion` for all page transitions and hover effects. The app must feel 'fluid'.
7. IMAGES: Use the provided Unsplash URLs for placeholders. Do NOT use empty divs.
8. CHARTS: Use `recharts` for the Music DNA profile (Radar Chart, Pie Chart). Style them with the custom color palette (Primary, Secondary, Accent).
9. PLAYER: The music player visualizer should be dynamic. Use a CSS animation bars or a canvas-based wave if possible.
10. SEARCH: Implement a 'Command Palette' style search if possible, or a robust top-bar search with instant filtering.
11. TONE: Keep the UI text minimal, punchy, and 'cool'. Avoid corporate speak.
12. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cards) for testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
